description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, boxy silhouette and clean lines, upholstered in a deep blue material. The sofa features two large seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all of which appear to be loose and well-padded for comfort. The armrests are straight, moderately high, and padded, matching the overall geometric design of the piece. The legs are short, block-style, and positioned at each corner, providing sturdy support while remaining visually unobtrusive. Subtle red piping outlines the edges of the cushions and frame, adding a touch of contrast and sophistication to the otherwise minimalist design. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or tufting, giving the sofa a contemporary and refined appearance.
description: A modern, deep blue two-seater sofa with straight padded armrests, loose cushions, and subtle red piping for contrast. The design is sleek and minimalist, with smooth upholstery and block-style legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight padded armrests, and red piping details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, armrest height, and cushion thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous backrest and the clean, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the straight armrest and overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size and shape, arranged side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at each end, matching the sofa's height and boxy profile, with subtle red piping as a design accent.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, block-style legs positioned at each corner, likely made of wood or metal, with a dark finish and minimal visual prominence.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with two loose back cushions, no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue upholstery with a smooth texture and subtle red piping along the edges; no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
